mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs
cp <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/kwok.yaml <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/kwok.yaml
mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components
kind version ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/kind-info.txt
kubectl logs -n kube-system etcd-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/etcd.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system kube-apiserver-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-apiserver.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system kube-controller-manager-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-controller-manager.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system kube-scheduler-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-scheduler.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system kwok-controller-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kwok-controller.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system metrics-server-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/metrics-server.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system prometheus-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/prometheus.log
kubectl logs -n kube-system jaeger-kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-control-plane ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/jaeger.log
